title: HTI Tumbling Tower Game | Fun Family Game | For Kids | Mini Travel Game | Ages 3+
features: Stable when you walk. The perfect game to test your nerves. See who has the most stable hand and eye coordination as you maneuver the blocks on the tower and stack them on top. Build the 48-piece tower and challenge your friends to a match.
A classic game that never gets old. Great entertainment for children and adults of all ages. This traditional original game has kept families entertained for generations

A great gift or present. The toy makes a great gift and this is no exception, this fun game will bring hours of fun for children of all ages and adults. Ideal for birthdays or Christmas as stocking fillers.
Product Specifications: Easy to play and assemble with 48 drum blocks. Suitable for ages 3+. 2 players required to play.
Made with safe, non-toxic ingredients and won't stick to your hands. All our products are tested to the highest UK CE standards to ensure your children's safety, please be careful comparing to others
